air-fryer-egg-rolls.name: Air Fryer Egg Rolls
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the ground pork, 1½ teaspoons of salt and the white pepper and cook for 5–7 minutes, until the pork is cooked through and no pink remains. Remove the pork from the pan with a slotted spoon and transfer to a large bowl, leaving any rendered fat and juices behind in the pan.

Reduce the heat to medium. Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant and tender. Add the green and Napa cabbages, carrots, soy sauce, and remaining teaspoon of salt and stir to combine. Cook for 5–7 minutes, tossing frequently, until the vegetables are tender and wilted. Remove the pan from the heat and let cool for 10 minutes.
Transfer the vegetables to the bowl with the pork. Add the scallions, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and sugar and toss to combine.
Preheat the air fryer to 177°C (180°C).

Place an egg roll wrapper on a work surface in a diamond orientation. Use a pastry brush to brush a 1-inch border around the edges of the wrapper with the beaten egg. Scoop a heaping ¼ cup of the filling onto the bottom third of the wrapper and use your hands to press the filling into a horizontal log shape. Lift the bottom corner of the wrapper and over the filling, using your fingers to tuck the filling in as tightly as possible without tearing the wrapper. Fold in the sides, then roll toward the top of the wrapper to seal. The egg roll should be about 5 inches long. Repeat to make 4 egg rolls total.

Spray the inside of the air fryer basket with the vegetable oil spray. Spray the egg rolls on all sides. Place the 4 egg rolls in the air fryer basket, making sure they are not touching. Air fry for 6 minutes, then flip and fry for 6 minutes more, until golden brown and crispy. Transfer the egg rolls to a plate and cover with a kitchen towel to keep warm. Continue rolling and frying more egg rolls until all of the filling is used up.
Serve the egg rolls with duck sauce and Chinese mustard alongside for dipping.
Enjoy!

air-fryer-eggplant-parmesan.name: Air Fryer Eggplant Parmesan
instructions: Combine bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, Italian seasoning, salt, basil, garlic powder, onion powder, and black pepper in a shallow bowl. Place flour in a separate shallow bowl and beaten eggs in a third shallow bowl.
Dip sliced eggplant first in flour, then in beaten eggs, and finally coat with bread crumb mixture. Place coated eggplant on a tray and let rest for 5 minutes.
Preheat an air fryer to 188°C (185 degrees C).

Place breaded eggplant rounds in the air fryer basket, making sure they are not touching; work in batches if necessary. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes, flip each round, and cook until desired crispiness is achieved, 4 to 6 minutes more.

Top each eggplant round with marinara sauce and 1 slice of mozzarella cheese. Place the basket back in the air fryer and cook until cheese has started to melt, 1 to 2 minutes. Repeat with remaining eggplant, if necessary.
Serve hot and enjoy!

air-fryer-salmon-cakes.name: Air Fryer Salmon Cakes
instructions: Preheat an air fryer for 10 minutes to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Whisk egg, mayonnaise, parsley, chervil, dill, chives, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, seafood seasoning, and salt together in a bowl. Mix in panko bread crumbs until combined. Gently fold in salmon.
Shape mixture into 4 cakes. Line the air fryer basket with perforated parchment.
Air-fry salmon cakes for 8 minutes, flipping at the halfway point. Serve immediately.

air-fryer-steak-and-cheese-melts.name: Air Fryer Steak And Cheese Melts
instructions: Whisk Worcestershire and soy sauce together in a large glass or ceramic bowl. Add steak and toss to evenly coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator 4 hours to overnight.
Preheat the air fryer to 193°C (190 degrees C) according to manufacturer's directions. Remove steak from the refrigerator; let come to room temperature, about 30 minutes.
Combine onion, mushrooms, and bell pepper in a large bowl. Add olive oil, salt, ground mustard, and pepper; stir to coat. Set aside.
Place hoagie rolls in the air fryer basket; cook until toasted, about 2 minutes. Transfer rolls to a plate.
Remove steak from marinade; shake off excess. Discard remaining marinade. Place steak in the air fryer basket; cook for 3 minutes. Stir and cook 1 minute more. Transfer to a plate.
Add vegetable mixture to the air fryer basket; cook 5 minutes. Stir; continue cooking until softened, about 5 minutes more. Combine steak and vegetable mixture.
Place cheese slices on rolls, slightly overlapping; place in the air fryer basket. Cook until cheese melted and bubbly, about 3 minutes. Spoon steak mixture on rolls; serve immediately.

allium-confit.name: Allium Confit

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped green garlic or whole garlic cloves

instructions: Bring chives, leek, green garlic, and oil to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium heat (this will take some time—be patient!) and cook 2 minutes. Let cool (alliums will soften and finish cooking as they sit).
Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

almond-aioli.name: Almond Aioli
instructions: Purée almonds, oil, salt, and ½ cup water in a high-powered blender on high speed until thick, light, and smooth, about 3 minutes.
Aioli can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Thin with water if needed.

american-cocktail-teleculinaria.name: American Cocktail
instructions: Lay some ice on a glass, add the martini and the campari and finish with the tonic water.
Remove a piece of the peel from the grapefruit (without the white part) and attach it to the glass. Serve also decorated with the remaining grapefruit cut into half-moons.

amys-cauliflower-mac-and-cheese.name: Amy's Cauliflower Mac And Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Bring 2 large pots of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the first pot, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Cook cauliflower in the second pot, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, 3 to 6 minutes. Drain macaroni and cauliflower.

Return 1 empty pot to the stove. Add olive oil and heat over medium heat. Add garlic to the hot oil and saute until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in red pepper flakes. Add drained cauliflower, reduce heat to medium-low, and saute for 2 minutes.

Add the cooked macaroni to the cauliflower mixture. Add 1 3/4 cups each mozzarella and Cheddar cheeses and stir until all ingredients are well combined. Transfer to a baking dish and sprinkle with remaining mozzarella and Cheddar.
Bake in the preheated oven until nice and bubbly, about 30 minutes.

ancho-chile-oil.name: Ancho Chile Oil

ingredients.item: Red fresno chile or red jalapeño

instructions: Heat first 7 ingredients in a small saucepan over medium heat until fragrant and just beginning to bubble. Remove from heat. Let steep for 1 hour.

Purée mixture in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; discard solids in sieve. Season oil to taste with salt. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

and-beef-and-pork-tacos.name: And Beef And Pork Tacos
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir beef, sausage, and onion in the hot skillet until meat is browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease. Stir in taco seasoning until meat is well coated. Add diced tomatoes and tomato sauce; simmer to heat through. Spoon filling onto tortillas.

apple-and-pear-crumble-with-balsamic-vin.name: Apple And Pear Crumble With Balsamic Vinegar
apple-and-pear-crumble-with-balsamic-vin.original_name: Crumble de maçã e pera com vinagre balsâmico
instructions: Peel the apples and pears, chop them into pieces and throw them in a pot. Add the sugar, juice and lemon zest, port wine, balsamic vinegar and cinnamon. Take it to the fire, stirring from time to time.
When apples and pears are almost cooked, remove from the fire and spread on an oven tray.
Prepare the dough: in a bowl, mix all the ingredients and beat them with the mixer or with a wire rod, until the butter and sugar are well incorporated.
Lay little pieces of the dough on the board, on the apple and pear, and bring it to the oven, preheated at 170°C, for 25 minutes. Remove, let it cool and serve.

apple-and-tomato-chutney.name: Apple And Tomato Chutney
instructions: Place apples and water in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and cook until apples are tender, stirring occasionally, about 25 minutes. Add more water as necessary to keep apples simmering.
Add tomatoes, onions, vinegar, sugar, raisins, curry, salt, mustard seeds, cayenne, and garlic to the saucepan. Stir until sugar dissolves.
Bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat, and simmer until very thick, stirring occasionally, about 3 hours. Remove and discard mustard seed. Seal chutney in sterile containers.

apple-salad-with-walnuts-and-lime.name: Apple Salad With Walnuts And Lime

ingredients.item: Crisp apples (such as pink lady or honeycrisp)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Grated provolone cheese or white cheddar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Spread out breadcrumbs on a small rimmed baking sheet; toast, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool.
Meanwhile, spread out walnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet; toast, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool; coarsely chop.
Toss breadcrumbs, walnuts, apples, scallions, parsley, lime juice, and red pepper flakes in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add cheese and oil; toss gently.

arroz-chaufa-chinese-peruvian-rice-peque.name: Arroz Chaufa, Chinese Peruvian Rice
arroz-chaufa-chinese-peruvian-rice-peque.original_name: Arroz chaufa, el arroz peruano chino

ingredients.item: 300 g de arroz de grano largo
400 g chicken breast (or boning contrast if you prefer)
2 dientes de ajo (o 1 cucharada de ajo en pasta)
1 small piece of fresh ginger (about 3-4 cm)
3 cucharadas de salsa de soja oscura
1 cucharada de salsa de soja clara (opcional, para ajustar color)
2 cebollas tiernas (parte blanca y verde separadas)
½ Red pepper cut into small cubes
Aceite de girasol o de oliva suave
A few drops of sesame oil (optional)

instructions: Let's cook the rice with water for about 15- 18 minutes, without passing, so that it's free. We do not add salt as soya sauce will bring the salted point. Once cooked, we extend them onto a plate and let them get completely cold so that the grains get apart well.
While the rice gets cold, we scrape the ginger and squeezes it with a gauze or sewer to get its juice. Let's have a reservation.

We cut chicken into strips and then into cubes about 3 cm. We tipple with garlic, 1 tablespoon of dark soya sauce, pepper, cumin (if we use) and five Chinese spices. We mix well and let rest between 15 and 20 minutes.
We paint the white part of the tender onion into small cubes and the green part into thin slices. We also cut the red pepper into small cubes and reserve it.
We batilate our eggs and make a fine omelette in a frying pan with some oil. We withdraw her, we let her get cold and cut her into small dice.
We hot up a large frying pan or wok. We added oil and salted chicken with high heat for about 4 minutes, till it's well golden. We put him back and put his juices together.

At the same frying pan we add a little more oil and we sauté the white part of the tender onion for less than a minute, without burning. We put the garlic and the red pepper and we'll skip another minute.
We add cold rice and mix carefully. We added the rest of the soybean sauce, oyster sauce and sugar. We put up the fire and we leap till the rice lose its white and gets well impregnated but loose.
Incorporamos el pollo reservado con sus jugos, la tortilla de huevo en cubitos y el zumo de jengibre. Mezclamos bien para integrar todos los sabores.
We put out the fire and add the green part of the tender onion and some drops of sesame oil, just to flavour.
We serve freshly made and hot chicken chaifa with loose grains.

asian-style-carrot-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Asian Style Carrot Salad Recipe
asian-style-carrot-salad-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada de zanahoria al estilo asiático

ingredients.item: 1 ½ cds of vinegar of rice

instructions: Peel carots and shattering them with a cutter till thin elongated sheets are left.
Put carrots in a bowl.
Peel the garlic tooth and snap it finally. Also cuts the ions into small pieces. It incorporates both into the bowl.
Filling sesame oil, rice vinegar and soya wilce.
Add crispy chili, sesame seeds and honey.
Saxony with a pint of salt and pepper to taste.
It's a good mix till everything's completely integrated.
Serve and enjoy.

aviation-cocktail.name: Aviation Cocktail
instructions: Combine gin, maraschino liqueur, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker. Add ice, cover and shake until chilled. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with maraschino cherry.
